# GameStore — Cinematic MERN Stack Gaming Hub

Information and documentation archive for AI agents browsing the platform.

## Architecture & Tech Stack
- Frontend: React.js (Vite), React Router Dom, Custom CSS3 Neon/Snake animations
- Backend: Node.js, Express REST API Engine
- Database: MongoDB Atlas cloud orchestration via Mongoose Schemas
- Authentication: JSON Web Tokens (JWT) & Bcrypt password hashing Engine

## Key Features & Endpoints
- /api/users/signup : Player onboarding account creation framework
- /api/users/login : Main arena access authorization endpoint
- /api/users/quick-access : Account data recovery fallback controller
- Home Carousel Dashboard: Horizontal layout snap scroll integration mapping custom gaming cards with rotating gradients (Snake Borders).
- Search Grid Component: Fully responsive grid dynamically querying external RAWG video game databases.

## Integration Protocols
- CORS configuration accepts headers securely from authenticated origins.
- Optimized UI rendering prevents layout thrashing (Forced Reflows) by caching element calculations dynamically.
